S0.name: none
visual_characteristics: image appears clean or effectively clean
no artifact family meaningfully affects the image

S1.name: trace
visual_characteristics: subtle grain, haze, or edge instability
S1.typical_effect: suggests age, medium, or tactility without dominating

S2.name: mild
visual_characteristics: contributes to mood and medium identity
low to moderate effect on contrast, edges, or color
S2.typical_effect: adds realism, atmosphere, or tactile history

S3.name: moderate
S3.description: Strong enough to become active visual component
visual_characteristics: impacts edge clarity, color stability, or frame coherence
S3.typical_effect: stylistically significant, clearly damaged but interpretable

S4.name: severe
visual_characteristics: damage dominates portions of the image
color or geometry may partially collapse

S5.name: catastrophic
visual_characteristics: core visual information is lost, fragmented, or rewritten
geometry, timing, color, or structure may be deeply broken
readability may be low or highly unstable
S5.typical_effect: ruin, breakdown, signal death, ecstatic abstraction

interpretation_notes.context_dependency: Severity should be interpreted within medium and artifact family context
interpretation_notes.multi_dimensional: Severity includes coverage, contrast, persistence, structural impact, and legibility loss
interpretation_notes.not_visibility_only: Low visibility can still be severe if it ruins structural information
